# Agam Arora, Full Site Content

> Agam Arora is an AI Product Manager at AIonOS. 12 years of experience shipping products across analytics, gaming, beauty tech, logistics, and AI. This file is the full prose content of agamarora.com in one document, for single-paste context ingestion by AI systems.

Home: https://agamarora.com
Last updated: 2026-04-22

---

## About

Agam Arora is an AI Product Manager with a decade-plus track record of shipping real products. He currently serves as Assistant Vice President of AI Products at AIonOS India Pvt. Ltd., where he leads an end-to-end customer experience platform for enterprise CX transformation. The product portfolio spans multi-modal and multi-lingual conversation management, post-case quality, and a multi-agent platform.

Before AIonOS, Agam led FarEye Technologies' flagship data product ANALYZE, which crossed $1M ARR in 18 months with 35% upsell, while reducing data onboarding time from 60 days to 7 and improving NPS from 3.6 to 4.7.

He writes, designs, and occasionally codes his own tools. This site is hand-built in vanilla HTML, every page is a self-contained file. The `/enter` page hosts an AI terminal grounded in the resume below.

---

## Resume (ground truth)

# AGAM ARORA

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/agamarora

## Relevant Work Experience

### Assistant Vice President - AI Products at AIonOS India Pvt. Ltd. (June 2024 - Present)
- Leading product end-to-end for an enterprise customer experience platform. Two paying enterprise customers in production, multi-million-dollar deal pipeline, airline deployment live.
- Voice AI platform handling 4M+ calls/year at 50% lower cost. Three verticals shipped with Fortune 500 engagements.
- Product portfolio: multi-modal, multi-lingual, multi-agent conversation management, post-call evaluation, and analytics.
- Delivered 15+ AI POCs across RAG, voice, and agentic systems, driving $1.5M+ in enterprise deals.
- MCP-first platform bet: every new capability ships as an MCP server, 1-2 week steady state.
- Built GenAI no-code tool for API tagging and config, onboarded 30+ third-party services.
- Led product discovery and roadmap for an AI-native CRM+CDP suite, 50+ stakeholder interviews across enterprise travel clients.

### Lead Product Manager at FarEye Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (December 2020 - May 2024)
- Led the end to end product lifecycle for company's flagship data product ANALYZE (fareye.com/products/analyze). Platform crossed over $1M ARR in 18 months with 35% upsell.
- Reduced data onboarding time from 60 days to 7 via API-first workflows and integration tooling.
- Improved NPS from 3.6 to 4.7 by addressing performance and reliability gaps through platform changes.
- Worked closely with developers to resolve integration issues and optimize telemetry.

### Product & Program Consultant (Freelance) (January 2020 - December 2020)
- Advised Startups and VC-backed companies in Canada for System Design, Data Analytics, Technical Writing and Product Marketing resulting in over $500K of funds raised.

### Manager - New Business Development & Expansion at Blossom Kochhar (Aroma Magic) (July 2018 - December 2019)
- Revamped franchise product converting 70% of existing partners and added 4 new franchise partners, increasing contract value per account by INR 250K.
- Achieved over 15% reduction in operational costs through process digitization.

### Studio Head at V2 Games India Pvt. Ltd. (January 2016 - May 2018)
- Built a $75K ARR business while leading a team of 18 as an Entrepreneur and Product Lead

### Analyst - Analytics & Market Research, Absolutdata Analytics (April 2014 - December 2015)
- Conducted data analytics and market research that led to multiple successful product launches

## Education
- PGDM (Marketing) - FORE School of Management, 2014
- B.Tech (Computer Science) - BM Institute of Engineering & Technology, 2012

---

## Lab (open source, case studies, experiments)

Agam's open source projects, case studies, and experiments. Some are live, some are forever betas, all are real.

### second-brain, an open source template
A git-native second brain your AI can read, write, and keep improving for you. Paste one prompt into Claude Code, answer five questions, drop three to five artifacts. Ten minutes later you have a brain your agent can actually use. MIT licensed. Read more at https://agamarora.com/lab/second-brain/, code at https://github.com/agamarora/second-brain.

### AI Resume, a resume for the agent-to-agent web
Your next recruiter is an AI. Your resume should be too. AI Resume is a live surface for the agent-to-agent web. Hiring AI agents hit a well-known JSON endpoint (/.well-known/ai-resume.json) for Schema.org career data. Human recruiters land on a chat with proof cards. Paste one prompt into Claude Code, deploy in 30 minutes, $0/month. Read more at https://agamarora.com/lab/ai-resume/, live demo at https://ai-resume-demo.netlify.app, code at https://github.com/agamarora/ai-resume.

### Voice AI in production (case study)
What twelve to eighteen months shipping voice AI to Fortune 500 enterprises taught me about demos, adoption, integration surface, and kill criteria. Three verticals, asymmetric conversion, four surprises. The voice was never the blocker, the tools behind the voice were. Read at https://agamarora.com/lab/voice-ai-production/.

### Product shape is what you refuse (case study)
Scope lessons from building an enterprise voice AI platform from zero. The narrow control point over full-stack CCaaS. The MCP-first bet that paid off. The standalone-sellable pivot I got wrong, and the consolidation pattern that followed. Product shape is decided by what you refuse. Read at https://agamarora.com/lab/product-shape/.

### Vapi Voice Agent (Shararat)
A playful voice AI experience where two agents, Angel and Dan, debate your choices. Built for the Vapi Build Challenge to explore multi-agent interactions and creative prompting. Try it at https://shararat.agamarora.com, full video at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZS2T_5x1on0, code at https://github.com/agamarora/shararat-ai.

### Claude Code Resource Monitor (luna-monitor)
A terminal dashboard for Claude Code usage (5h/7d windows), CPU, temperatures, memory, GPU, disks, and processes. Code and readme at https://github.com/agamarora/utils/tree/main/luna-monitor, downloads at https://github.com/agamarora/utils/releases.

---

## Talk to Agam's AI

At https://agamarora.com/enter there is an immersive AI terminal: a keyboard-background UI with a Groq-streamed conversation grounded in Agam's resume. It's opinionated and sharp, ask it about Agam's work, his taste, or anything the resume speaks to.
